title: Funded-lane batch authoring/computation run (budget-capped)
context: If donated-compute throughput is insufficient for a batch authoring or computation run (e.g. generating all synthetic example datasets, running the full reproducibility harness across the set, or batch-drafting explainer scaffolding), the project may use the Elyos funded lane for a budget-capped, metered API execution run via packages/runner. This task uses an Anthropic API key supplied by the funder; the key must never be written to logs, receipts, or committed files. The hard per-task budget cap is enforced by the runner and must not be exceeded. The actual budget and scope of the funded run must be confirmed before this task is started.
objective: Execute a funded-lane batch authoring or computation run within the hard budget cap using packages/runner, producing a PR with the batch output — without logging, committing, or exposing the API key at any point.
acceptanceCriteria: The task runs exclusively via packages/runner with a hard per-task budget cap; the runner enforces the cap and the task never exceeds the escrow amount.
The Anthropic API key is supplied by the funder at runtime only; it is never written to logs, receipts, committed files, or any artifact in the repo.

The batch output (e.g. synthetic datasets, scaffolded explainer drafts, reproducibility computation results) is committed in a PR that passes all existing CI gates (repro-005 harness, provgate-015 provenance gate, pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm lint).
The PR description records the total tokens consumed and cost against the budget cap, without including the API key or any secret.
All generated statistical content in the batch output is flagged as draft/unreviewed; no funded-lane output ships as published content without passing the biostatistician sign-off gate.
The actual fundedBudgetUsd cap is confirmed and set before the task starts; the task must not proceed without a confirmed budget.
resources: packages/runner — funded-lane runner with hard budget cap enforcement
PLAN.md — Security & privacy (funded lane, API key handling); Architecture rules (funded lane)
output: A PR containing batch-generated output from the funded-lane run, within the confirmed budget cap, with all secrets handled correctly, all CI gates passing, and all generated statistical content marked as draft pending biostatistician review.
